whenToUse.summary: Fastest, lowest-friction way to capture an email from warm-to-medium traffic by trading a single curiosity-driven promise for the opt-in. The most foundational lead-capture mechanism in the Brunson system.
goals: Capture leads at the lowest cost per lead
Stand up the front-end of a value ladder
signals: No need to teach or warm the visitor first
You want the absolute minimum friction to capture
doNotUseWhen: Traffic is cold/skeptical and needs warming (use Bridge or Reverse Squeeze)
Offer is high-ticket and needs qualification (use Application)
You need to segment buyers (use Survey/Quiz)

pageStructure.purpose: Trade a curiosity-driven promise for the visitor's email before they can proceed.
blocks: Zero navigation / no header links / no distractions
Optional background image or muted video

pageStructure.purpose: Deliver the promise and set the next step; auto-redirect destination of the opt-in.
blocks: Access link or 'check your email' instruction

copyFramework.script: Curiosity-Gap Headline formula + the compressed 'Hook' of Hook-Story-Offer (story and offer are deferred to the follow-up).
structure: Headline using the 4 U's (Useful, Urgent, Unique, Ultra-specific)
copyFramework.notes: One promise, one field, one button. The squeeze carries no story on the page; its entire job is the headline hook. A/B test headlines relentlessly.

primaryPersonaResolved.label: The Copy Closer
primaryPersonaResolved.author: Jim Edwards
owns_scripts: Headline formulas (4 U's: Useful, Urgent, Unique, Ultra-specific; How-To; Who-Else-Wants; curiosity gap)
primaryPersonaResolved.voice: Curiosity-driven headlines and irresistible bullets; sell the click and the open.

supportingPersonasResolved.label: The Funnel Architect
supportingPersonasResolved.author: Russell Brunson
owns_scripts: The Attractive Character (backstory, parables, character flaws, polarity)
supportingPersonasResolved.voice: Direct-response funnel mechanics; sequence the visitor from curiosity to conversion.

skill44Widgets: Opt-in Form widget with a single Email field, bound to a contact + tag, redirect-on-submit to the Thank-You step
ghlBuild.notes: Strip the funnel header so there is zero navigation. Use a sticky single CTA. Keep the form to Email only to minimize friction.
